targets.query:
from(bucket: "claude")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "claude_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.model =~ /${model:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project =~ /${project:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.worktree =~ /${worktree:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cost")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "claude")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "claude_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.model =~ /${model:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project =~ /${project:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.worktree =~ /${worktree:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ctx_pct")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "claude")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "claude_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.model =~ /${model:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project =~ /${project:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.worktree =~ /${worktree:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "five_pct")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "claude")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "claude_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.model =~ /${model:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project =~ /${project:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.worktree =~ /${worktree:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "week_pct")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "claude")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "claude_session")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.host =~ /${host:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.model =~ /${model:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project =~ /${project:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.worktree =~ /${worktree:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "cost")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "last")

from(bucket: "claude")

  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.project =~ /${project:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.worktree =~ /${worktree:regex}/)
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
